summary: Complete testing of Custom Scenario Builder Module. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working via Playwright automation including base scenario selection from 102 hub scenarios, parameter customization UI, Preview Impacts calculation, and Monte Carlo simulation.

issues: Minor: Page subtitle shows '0 scenarios' briefly before API loads (race condition on initial render)

seed_data_creation: 102 hub scenarios available as base scenarios (WITCH, IRENA, TIAM-ECN, GCAM, IEA, NGFS, ADVANCE, etc.). Custom scenarios created during tests were cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Custom Scenario Builder module fully tested and working. Uses hub_scenarios (102 available) as base for customizations. All CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete, fork) working. Monte Carlo simulation runs 1000 iterations by default. Impact calculations include temperature projections, emissions trajectories, risk scores (physical + transition), and economic impacts. Frontend page at /custom-builder has 4 tabs (Build/Results/Simulation/Saved) and uses Recharts for visualization.
passed_tests: TestBaseScenarios::test_scenario_has_required_fields - Scenarios have id, name, source_name, trajectory_count
TestBaseScenarios::test_scenarios_have_different_sources - Multiple sources (WITCH, IRENA, GCAM, NGFS, etc.)
TestPreview::test_preview_returns_risk_scores - Physical risk, transition risk, overall risk
Custom Builder page loads at /custom-builder route
Page header shows 'Custom Scenario Builder' with '102 scenarios' subtitle
4 tabs present: Build, Results, Simulation, Saved
Base scenario dropdown shows 102 options from all sources (WITCH, IRENA, TIAM-ECN, GCAM, NGFS, etc.)
Selecting base scenario displays badges (source, temperature target, trajectory count)
5 parameter add buttons available (CO2 Emissions, Carbon Price, Primary Energy, Coal Energy, GDP)
Parameter customization panel shows inputs for 2030, 2040, 2050 years
Preview Impacts button calculates and displays results
Results tab shows: Temperature by 2100, P(<1.5°C), Physical Risk, Transition Risk scores
Results tab shows Temperature Trajectory and Emissions charts with Recharts
Save & Simulate runs Monte Carlo (1000 iterations)
Simulation tab shows: iterations, temp median, p5-p95 range, probability distributions
Saved tab displays list of custom scenarios with base scenario info and risk score
